message:
feat(mvcc): integrate cell-level visibility log and structural page tracking (C4: bd-l9k8e.4)

- Add cell_log field to TransactionManager (CellVisibilityLog, 25MB budget)
- Expose cell_log() accessor for recording cell-level INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE deltas
- Mark pages as structural in write_page() so they use page-level MVCC
- Call clear_structural_pages() on abort() to clean up tracking state
- Add TxnToken construction in publish_write_set() for commit routing
- Add tests: commit_mixed_structural_and_logical_pages, abort_rolls_back_cell_deltas,
  cell_log_accessor

These changes wire the CellVisibilityLog into TransactionManager without yet
routing the cell-delta commit path (logical pages still go through the full
page-level path). Subsequent work will add the structural/logical routing
decision in publish_write_set() and the cell-delta WAL frame emission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
